Z = Swing bed designation for critical access hospitals 

There is also a special numbering system for assigning emergency hospital identification numbers (non-
participating hospitals). 

The sixth position of the provider number is as follows: 

E = Non-federal emergency hospital 

F = Federal emergency hospital 

Starting in 2021, the PRVDR_BASE_FAC_CCN_NUM is populated with CCN of the parent provider for
